events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail**, critical risk. Uncovered combustibles within the hot work radius while cutting/welding is actively underway is a live ignition hazard under NFPA 51B (35-ft clearance/shielding rule) and OSHA 1926.352. Required immediate controls: stop hot work, relocate or shield combustibles with fire-resistant covers, verify permit and fire watch with a charged extinguisher are in place before resuming.
